title: CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website neeri.res.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B. Tech in Civil/Chemical from a recognized University
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: B.E./B. Tech in Civil/Chemical from a recognized University

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 02 June 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Associate-I position announced by CSIR-NEERI.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B. Tech degree in Civil/Chemical from a recognized University to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, plus HRA, depending on qualification and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the CSIR-NEERI located for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: CSIR-NEERI is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440020.

faq.question: Q9. Do I need to apply online before the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is for a Walk-in Interview, meaning you do not need to apply online beforehand. You just need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant certificates.
